message:
Fix JSON5 scalar parsing in cross-chunk and end-of-buffer paths

Seven locations in spScan and ptScan used JSON.parse() for scalar
finalization instead of format-aware parsing. This caused JSON5-specific
values (Infinity, -Infinity, +Infinity, NaN, hex numbers like 0xFF) to
be parsed as null when they spanned chunk boundaries or hit end-of-buffer.

All scalar parse points now use parseJson5Scalar() when format is json5,
matching the in-chunk handlers that already did this correctly.

Adds 3 tests: JSON5 Infinity in streaming, EventParser, and cross-chunk.
